plugins.name: performance-marketer
plugins.description: B2B performance marketing plugin for LinkedIn Ads. Includes campaign health diagnostics, 3-level ads reporting, and audience export to LinkedIn Matched Audiences. Powered by Supabase data.

plugins.name: meta-skills
plugins.description: Evergreen meta-skills for AI-native operators: structured thinking, skill creation, auditing, and visualization. Agent-agnostic — works with Claude Code, Claude Desktop, and Hermes.
